title: Set busy_timeout to handle write contention
description: Configure busy_timeout so a connection waits for the writer lock instead of immediately failing with SQLITE_BUSY.
body: Use when multiple connections may write and you see SQLITE_BUSY. Do not leave busy_timeout at the default 0, which makes any contended write fail instantly. Actions: set PRAGMA busy_timeout=<ms> (e.g. 5000) on every connection so it waits and retries for the lock; keep write transactions short so the writer lock is released quickly; for read-then-write use BEGIN IMMEDIATE to take the write lock up front and avoid an upgrade deadlock. Validation signals include a concurrency test where contended writes succeed after a brief wait rather than erroring. Risk boundary: a long busy_timeout masking a long-held write transaction just trades errors for latency; fix the slow transaction.
